chunks.text: 1 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI First Appeal No.11 of 2022 Dated Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No. 255/2022 3. For hearing of CMA No. 700/2022 Dated 07.03.2024 None present for the Appellant Mr. Muhammad Farooq Advocate for the Respondent.-.-.-.-.-. Counsel for the appellant was called absent on the last date and so also today. There is no intimation either. We have been informed by Mr. Muhammad Farooq, learned counsel for the Respondent that the execution has been satisfied and perhaps for this reason the appellant and his counsel are not attending the Court and appearing in this appeal. In view of the above, we dismiss this appeal for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
